title: Missing field_value parameter in Xano API call
symptom: When testing the function stack, the error 'Missing param: field_value' appears, indicating a required input is not provided.
applies_when: Using Xano to add images to a record
Function stack includes actions that require field_value
not_this_if: All required parameters are correctly set in the function stack
root_cause: The error occurs because the function stack is missing a necessary input parameter named 'field_value'. This can happen if the data types are incorrectly set or if the input is not properly bound to the actions in the stack.
fix_steps: Open each action in the Xano function stack
Check the inputs and ensure 'field_value' is correctly defined and bound
Verify that the data types are set correctly (input/variable instead of expression/text)
agent_instruction: Ensure that the 'field_value' parameter is correctly defined and bound in your Xano function stack.
